message:
fix(mvcc): restore snapshot backpressure semantics and address clippy lints

Critical bug fix in force_advance_oldest_snapshot():
- Change from dropping entire refcount to decrementing by 1, so
  snapshots are only released when all references are gone. Previous
  behavior caused premature snapshot eviction breaking backpressure
  under concurrent reader load.

Clippy lint suppressions across MVCC and related crates:
- ffs-mvcc: #[allow(clippy::result_large_err)] on FCW/SSI commit paths
- ffs-mvcc/sharded: same for sharded commit entry points
- ffs-journal/wal_buffer: #[allow(clippy::significant_drop_tightening)]
  and #[allow(dead_code)] on epoch advance stub
- ffs-fuse: Refactor AccessPredictor borrow checker issue via extraction
  pattern (extract old_touch before mutation)
- ffs-mvcc/persist: Update string formatting to use format vars directly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
